jsonLd.title: CRISIL is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
